discriminator.reasoning: The mini app is a classic implementation of a Tic-Tac-Toe game with a clean, reusable HTML/CSS/JavaScript structure. It includes a well-defined game-loop with turn-based logic and AI for an opponent, which is a pattern other users seeking to build turn-based games could benefit from.
